logs.message: WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Design contains AXI ports. Reset is fixed to synchronous and active low.
WARNING: [BIND 205-102] The specified resource core for memory 'row_buf_V_3' will be ignored if a simpler one can be used.
WARNING: [BIND 205-102] The specified resource core for memory 'row_buf_V' will be ignored if a simpler one can be used.
WARNING: [BIND 205-102] The specified resource core for memory 'row_buf_V_2' will be ignored if a simpler one can be used.
WARNING: [BIND 205-102] The specified resource core for memory 'row_buf_V_1' will be ignored if a simpler one can be used.

WARNING: [HLS 200-1450] Process process_pixels has both a successor and writes an output to its caller (see the GUI dataflow viewer). This may lead to lower throughput. Consider copying this output via a successor process. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-1450 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=200-1450.html

WARNING: [HLS 200-1450] Process pad has both a successor and writes an output to its caller (see the GUI dataflow viewer). This may lead to lower throughput. Consider copying this output via a successor process. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-1450 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=200-1450.html

WARNING: [HLS 200-1450] Process unpack has both a successor and writes an output to its caller (see the GUI dataflow viewer). This may lead to lower throughput. Consider copying this output via a successor process. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-1450 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=200-1450.html

WARNING: [Simtcl 6-197] One or more HDL objects could not be logged because of object type or size limitations. To see details please rerun the command with -verbose (-v). ## set designtopgroup [add_wave_group "Design Top Signals"] ## set coutputgroup [add_wave_group "C Outputs" -into $designtopgroup] ## set return_group [add_wave_group return(axis) -into $coutputgroup] ## add_wave /apatb_accelerator_v2_top/AESL_inst_accelerator_v2/out_stream_TREADY -into $return_group -color #ffff00 -radix hex ## add_wave /apatb_accelerator_v2_top/AESL_inst_accelerator_v2/out_stream_TVALID -into $return_group -color #ffff00 -radix hex ## run all //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// // Inter-Transaction Progress: Completed Transaction / Total Transaction // Intra-Transaction Progress: Measured Latency / Latency Estimation * 100% // // RTL Simulation : "Inter-Transaction Progress" ["Intra-Transaction Progress"] @ "Simulation Time" //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// // RTL Simulation : 0 / 1 [0.00%] @ "125000" // RTL Simulation : 1 / 1 [100.00%] @ "9270555000" //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// $finish called at time : 9270615 ns : File "/misc/scratch/gwl459/augmented-reality-glasses/fpga_software/PL/accelerator_v2/solution1/sim/verilog/accelerator_v2.autotb.v" Line 473 run: Time (s): cpu = 00:14:19 ; elapsed = 00:14:43 . Memory (MB): peak = 5459.480 ; gain = 0.000 ; free physical = 212750 ; free virtual = 358896 ## quit
